doctrine.law: Draw order is cause/motion. Sorted order is result/body.
doctrine.rule: do not read sorted body as a guess for draw order; read draw order as transition physics first

draw_order_transition.rule: previous draw order -> current draw order -> outgoing contract -> next draw order -> sorted body result

draw_order_taxonomy.rule: D1-D5 are read as cause/motion lanes before sorted body result

incoming_motion.rule: previous draw -> current draw by D1-D5 lane

current_pressure.set_health: Tensioned Sky Fighter High Kid High King
current_pressure.technical_signature: S1_CORE_SKY | ENTRY_FIGHTER_HIGH_EXIT_GRUNT | S2_S4_FIGHTER_HIGH_THEN_KID | MIDDLE_STABLE_PRESSURE | ENTRY_EXIT_TILTED_AROUND_MIDDLE | S5_ENDPOINT_HIGH_KING

pressure_world.rule: pressure world groups the draw by structural/dynamic authority, dominant pressure center, balance, and distribution

draw_singularity_lens.rule: Draw Singularity Lens names the active motion problem before branch selection; it is an IIW-native family/subfamily/internal-profile layer.
draw_singularity_lens.read: DS compresses the room between broad branch law and over-specific raw fields: family names the branch universe, subfamily names the pressure world and authority, internal profile names the motion condition.

resolution_bias.rule: resolution bias chooses the destination family before collision point is finalized

motion_state.rule: current motion state plus current technical body becomes the allowed outgoing state layer

motion_archetype.rule: motion archetype names the action/event created by state, flow, transfer, burden, and outgoing lane

collision_point.rule: collision point is where the winning authority terminates before number placement
collision_point.collision_reason: authority pressure terminated at an edge or endpoint
collision_point.baseline_collision_reason: authority pressure terminated at an edge or endpoint

pre_collision_preference_field.read: no historical branch field exists for this exact level-4 room yet

branch_selector.rule: branch selector learns which side of the pre-collision preference field wins
branch_selector.read: no measured branch field exists for this room yet

pressure_world.rule: pressure world groups the draw by structural/dynamic authority, dominant pressure center, balance, and distribution

inputs.technical_signature: S1_CORE_SKY | ENTRY_FIGHTER_HIGH_EXIT_GRUNT | S2_S4_FIGHTER_HIGH_THEN_KID | MIDDLE_STABLE_PRESSURE | ENTRY_EXIT_TILTED_AROUND_MIDDLE | S5_ENDPOINT_HIGH_KING

origin_weight_validation.rule: validate whether highest pressure origin became dominant outgoing sorted seat
origin_weight_validation.debug_read: boundary unknown until next draw exists

incoming_body_effect.rule: dominant incoming draw-lane motion is mapped onto its current sorted seat

outgoing_contract.body_search_rule: next draw is missing, so no lawful outgoing contract can be confirmed yet

motion_law_candidate.rule: highest burden lane + pressure relation + incoming transfer = likely outgoing motion lane
motion_law_candidate.candidate: S1 HIGH HOLD + ENTRY_EXIT_TILTED_AROUND_MIDDLE + BOUNDARY_UNKNOWN -> None

sorted_result_body.rule: sorted S1-S5 body is the result/body after draw order motion is read

lawful_search_rule: motion first, body second, proposal last; do not admit bodies unless their sorted body can express the outgoing contract

truth_control.rule: truth control separates observed facts, live-safe inference, historical explanation, discovery memory, and exact-answer authority

truth_levels.OBSERVED_FACT: directly read from the current or previous/current draw
truth_levels.HISTORICAL_FACT: known only because the next historical draw exists
truth_levels.HISTORICAL_EXPLANATION: explains how the known next draw resolved
truth_levels.DISCOVERY_ONLY: learned from historical fields and not trusted live by itself
truth_levels.UNPROVEN: pattern exists but exact answer authority is not proven
truth_levels.NO_CALL: not enough live-safe evidence to make the claim

world.rule: pressure world groups the draw by structural/dynamic authority, dominant pressure center, balance, and distribution

exact_branch_claim.read: next draw is missing, so no exact outgoing branch can be truth-scored
exact_branch_claim.doctrine: Seat Taxonomy may describe exact branch history, but exact branch live authority must come from prior-only conditional memory proof.

blocked_from_live_prediction: transfer reversal built from current-to-next motion

mode_policy.purpose: Deeper explanation route with full memory-room reporting.

last_writes_stage.law: Nightfall/Utopia block next draw truth; short_circuit_historical may include it for diagnostic replay.
